title: CrosshairFX
description: A simple visual mod that spices up your game with custom crosshair colors & shapes!
body:
A simple visual mod that spices up your game with custom crosshair colors & shapes! 
# Features:
- Change the color, thickness, and length of the crosshair
- Change the shape of the crosshair to custom models
- Change the color of the crosshair based on the block/entity you are looking at
- Apply an animated rainbow effect to the crosshair
- A customizable attack indicator
  - Custom size, color, and position
  - Can show sword charge or block breaking progress (or both)


 Join the [discord](https://discord.gg/7a5KPXHaY4) for updates and to report bugs!
